message:
feat(moe): add Q2_K sparse kernel pipelines

Register hybrid Q2_K + sparse outlier kernels in MoE Metal engine:
- pipeline_expert_q2k_sparse: Fused gate/up with sparse correction
- pipeline_down_proj_q2k_sparse: Down projection with sparse correction
- pipeline_matvec_q2k: Pure Q2_K matvec (benchmarking)

These pipelines are now available for hybrid format runtime integration.
Full integration requires:
1. Q2_K model creation (via llama-quantize)
2. CSR buffer loading from hybrid.csr file
3. Kernel dispatch switching in mixtral_lazy.zig
